title: Migrate diff, exec, export, and history to ginkgo
body:
Migrate the diff, exec, export, and history bats tests to
the ginkgo test suite.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: Bunch of extra whitespace, but otherwise LGTM. Faster we deprecate BATS the better
@baude I think some of your tests are still in the wrong files
Yeah it looks like some bad git action happened ... don't merge until I get a chance to fix this please.

:pushpin: Commit 6aa5df5 has been approved by `baude`
